untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking of option volume initiator classification (full-service brokerage vs. discount brokerage vs. proprietary traders). This requires metadata/data source tracking that is not available in standard OHLCV price/technical indicator space. No allowed indicator can distinguish trader class or option flow origin. Signal depends on order book source tags and counterparty identification, not price action or volume aggregates.
translation_notes: SSRN_622869_4 is a microstructure-based signal that requires access to order initiation source data. While 'volume' is available as an indicator, the critical differentiator is WHO initiated the volume (institutional brokerage tier classification), which requires external data enrichment beyond technical indicators. The signal cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, oscillators, and volume ratios.
